examples: She saw his blurry figure in the headlight, walking around the front of the car.
Clothes rolled up in the towel and stowed in the panniers; check. The headlight battery pack on the charger; check.
In a moment, the red glare from the headlight streamed up the snow-covered track before the siding and glittered on the wet, black platform.
He added that she was wearing dark clothing and it was possible her front headlight was not working.
My headlight is off, partly to save batteries, mostly to savor the surreal experience of climbing at night.
